evalAfter: (async()=>{const w=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const b=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(b)b.click();await w(3000);try{MOS.nav('catalogo')}catch(e){}await w(2500);try{MOS.abrirModalProducto()}catch(e){try{MOS.abrirModalProducto('')}catch(e2){}}await w(1500);const vw=window.innerWidth;const modal=document.querySelector('.modal.open,.modal-backdrop.open,[id^=modal]:not(.hidden),.is-open');const r={vw};if(modal){const box=modal.querySelector('div');const mr=(box||modal).getBoundingClientRect();r.modalW=Math.round(mr.width);r.modalOverflowRight=Math.round(mr.right-vw);r.modalLeft=Math.round(mr.left);const ins=[...modal.querySelectorAll('input,select,textarea')];r.inputs=ins.length;r.inputsChicos=ins.filter(i=>parseFloat(getComputedStyle(i).fontSize)<16).length;r.anchoContenido=Math.round(modal.scrollWidth);r.overflowXinterno=modal.scrollWidth>modal.clientWidth+2;}else{r.modalNoAbrio=true;r.abiertos=[...document.querySelectorAll('[class*=modal],[class*=open],[class*=is-open]')].slice(0,5).map(e=>e.id||e.className.toString().slice(0,30));}return r;})()
